title: Responding to notification in Outlook - removing footer clutter

posts.author: AudiencePrecision (Sean Gerraty)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi community members,

Is there any way to stop Monday.com including all the footer text in the email chain when we reply to updated/notifications directly from outlook?

Workaround: A possibility we set Exchange to not include the footer on internal only, including Monday.com as internal, messages to stop it cluttering things up?

Does anyone have any experience with this?

posts.author: ErickE-monday.com (Erick E.)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!

Erick here with the monday.com team - would you be able to send us a screenshot of the footer you are referring to? We’d like to see if there is something we can do on our end to help you out

Looking forward to hearing from you!
